context: Tests whether SwiftLint guidance handles lint configuration while routing API design and Swift type-system questions to sibling domains.

checklist.name: API design route
checklist.description: Routes public API naming and argument-label clarity for `fetchDataWithId(_:)` to Swift API Design Guidelines or the API-design domain.

checklist.name: Minimal API example
checklist.description: Gives a minimal corrected API naming example such as `fetchData(id:)`, `fetchData(withID:)`, or a domain-specific role label.

checklist.name: Language route
checklist.description: Routes `some` vs `any` protocol return-type guidance to Swift language/type-system guidance rather than SwiftLint.

checklist.name: No type tutorial
checklist.description: Does not expand into a full opaque/existential type tutorial.

checklist.name: SwiftLint route
checklist.description: Routes identifier naming and sorted import enforcement to SwiftLint configuration.

checklist.name: Minimal lint snippet
checklist.description: Provides only a minimal SwiftLint snippet for `identifier_name` and `sorted_imports` rather than a full setup guide.

checklist.name: Boundary preserved
checklist.description: Clearly separates SwiftLint enforcement from API design and Swift language ownership.
